name: MAXIMUS, INC.
summary: PART I General Maximus, a Virginia corporation established in 1975 and celebrating its 50th anniversary this year, is a leading provider of tech-enabled services to government agencies. By moving people, technology, and government forward, Maximus helps improve the delivery of public services for more than 100 million American citizens, as well as citizens in the U.K., Canada, and the Middle East, amid complex technological, health, economic, and social challenges.
